title: Operator of website that shamed debtors for profit takes down website after OPC takes the matter to Federal Court
summary: The website stated that it was dedicated to “exposing judgment debtors on the web.” For a fee, anyone trying to collect a court-ordered debt payment could post details of their judgment on the website, such as the amount owing and the debtor’s name. The creditor could also include additional personal information, such as the debtor’s addr...
dedupKey: operator of website that shamed debtors for profit takes down website after opc takes the matter to federal court|2017-08-08
